name: PDF Tools (pdf-mcp.io)
description: Generate PDFs from HTML, extract text from PDFs, merge PDFs, and manage PDF files (pdf-mcp.io, 100 free credits)

credentials_required.label: pdf-mcp.io API Key
credentials_required.hint: Free at pdf-mcp.io — 100 credits included, no credit card needed

tools.name: html_to_pdf
tools.description: Generate a PDF from HTML content with optional CSS styling

tools.name: extract_text
tools.description: Extract text content from a PDF by URL

tools.name: merge_pdfs
tools.description: Merge multiple PDFs into one by URLs

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Get download link for a stored PDF

author: freddy-schuetz
